games.name: Catan
games.quickref:
Each turn: roll dice, collect resources, trade, build.

Easy to forget:
- Robber activates on a 7 (move robber, steal 1 card from adjacent player)
- Players with 8+ cards on a 7 must discard half
- Longest road needs 5+ segments
- Largest army needs 3+ knight cards
- You can trade 4:1 with the bank anytime
- Ports let you trade 3:1 (general) or 2:1 (specific resource)

games.name: Codenames
games.quickref:
Two teams, each with a spymaster. Spymasters give one-word clues + a number.

Easy to forget:
- Clue must be ONE word and a number
- If you guess the assassin word, your team loses instantly
- You always get one extra guess beyond the number given
- Spymasters must keep a straight face

games.name: King of Tokyo
games.quickref:
Roll 6 dice up to 3 times (Yahtzee-style). Score points, attack, heal, or gain energy.

Easy to forget:
- You cannot heal while in Tokyo
- You MUST enter Tokyo if it's empty
- When you take damage in Tokyo, you can yield (leave)
- 3 of a kind scores that number in points; each extra die = +1 point
- First to 20 points OR last monster standing wins
